name: ts2pant
description: Translate TypeScript functions into checkable Pantagruel specifications

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && BUILD_WASM=true dune build wasm/ && rm -rf tools/ts2pant/src/wasm && mkdir -p tools/ts2pant/src/wasm && cp _build/default/wasm/pant_wasm.bc.wasm.js tools/ts2pant/src/wasm/ && cp -r _build/default/wasm/pant_wasm.bc.wasm.assets tools/ts2pant/src/wasm/ && perl -i -pe 's/require\.main\.filename/__filename/' tools/ts2pant/src/wasm/pant_wasm.bc.wasm.js
